The '''attack on Mon Calamari''' was an attack by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] launched in the early part of her [[Daala campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. An immobilized [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] was accidentally reactivated on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], and Admiral Daala's fleet picked up the resulting transmission and responded by attacking the planet.

==The battle==
Exiting [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] close to the planet, Daala's forces caught the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] defenses off guard. Still reeling from the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Battle of Calamari|assault]], the Mon Calamari were able to put up a meager defense but not before Daala had caused heavy damage to several important floating cities, including [[Reef Home City]]. The Mon Calamari were able to retaliate somewhat, when the tactical genius of Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] resulted in the destruction of one of Daala's [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], the ''[[Manticore]]''.

Daala, angered at the loss of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], pressed the attack, committing her [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] to close range strafing attacks. When a New Republic fleet responded to the Mon Calamari distress call, Daala recalled her forces and fled the system.
